description: Audit at least 8 electricity generation processes (e.g., 'electricity', 'grid', 'power') from the USLCI database in OpenLCA. Document the Process Name, Category Path, Location, Number of Input Exchanges, Number of Output Exchanges, and Reference Product Flow for each. Export the compiled data to '~/LCA_Results/electricity_audit.csv' as a CSV with a header row. If necessary, import the USLCI database from '~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip' before beginning.
